S.FORM: Kelenna Azubuike sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 12, Kelenna Azubuike, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kelenna azuő≤uike s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, kelenna azuő≤uike, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
